queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default probability associated with higher requested credit amounts and their contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: An empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating determinants linked to applicants lacking a known savings account and their influence on reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of credit risk drivers associated with the absence of a checking account and their contribution to elevated default probability.
